blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

You've enjoyed traveling through this learning path as you:

- Invited team members to collaborate in your Grafana Cloud environment
- Navigated to documentation and installed a data source to connect your systems
- Found and installed an integration to monitor specific technologies
- Configured billing and usage alerts to manage costs
- Discovered additional learning paths for expanding your expertise

You've successfully completed account onboarding tasks to help your team get started with observability. Your Grafana Cloud environment is configured with team collaboration, data connectivity, monitoring solutions, and cost management controls.

The learning paths linked below provide deeper expertise in specific areas of observability. Whether you want to explore data using query-less experiences, monitor specific infrastructure, or send data using different methods, these journeys help you build advanced skills and implement best practices.

Your observability journey continues with the knowledge and tools to monitor, analyze, and understand your systems effectively. Welcome to the Grafana community.

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey.

- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
- [Explore logs using Logs Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-logs/)
- [Monitor a Linux server in Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/linux-server-integration/)
- [Send metrics to Grafana Cloud using Prometheus remote write](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/prom-remote-write/)
